data.name: AddFilesToolTip
data.value: Add local files to the prompt as #file mentions.

data.name: SearchToolTip
data.value: Type plain text to chat with Copilot, or use /mail /teams /sharepoint /onedrive /onenote /task /connectors /all /ask /workiq /clear

data.name: GenericHelpText
data.value: Type a message to chat with Microsoft 365 Copilot. Mention local files with #path for chat context, or use slash commands such as /all to search Microsoft 365 content.

data.name: SignedOutText
data.value: Not signed in. Configure Client ID under Tools > Options > ContextRelay.

data.name: RequestedSourceDisabledStatus
data.value: The requested source is disabled in ContextRelay options.

data.name: AskDisabledStatus
data.value: /ask is disabled. Enable chat preview in ContextRelay options.

data.name: ChatPreviewDisabledStatus
data.value: Copilot chat is disabled. Enable chat preview in ContextRelay options.

data.name: AskRequiresPinnedContextStatus
data.value: Pin one or more snippets or mention a local file with #path before using /ask. Explicit context is sent to Microsoft 365 Copilot.

data.name: FileMentionPromptEmptyStatus
data.value: Prompt is empty after removing # file mentions.

data.name: FilePickerWorkspaceUnavailableStatus
data.value: Open a solution or workspace file before adding local files.

data.name: FilePickerNoWorkspaceFilesSelectedStatus
data.value: None of the selected files are eligible workspace files for # mentions.

data.name: FilePickerAddFilesFailedStatus
data.value: Failed to add selected files. Check the output log for details.

data.name: CreatedFilesFolderSelectionCanceledStatus
data.value: No target folder was selected. ContextRelay did not create any files.

data.name: WorkIqLocalFileContextDisabledStatus
data.value: Local file context for Work IQ is disabled. Enable "Allow local file context for Work IQ" in ContextRelay options to send bounded file text with /workiq #file prompts.

data.name: FileMentionWorkspaceUnavailableStatus
data.value: Open a solution or workspace file before using #file mentions.

data.name: ResultPinnedWithExcerptFallbackStatus
data.value: Result pinned to snippets. Full content could not be fetched, so the saved snippet uses the search excerpt.

data.name: OpenCopilotPromptReadyStatus
data.value: Prompt copied. Paste it into GitHub Copilot Chat in Visual Studio.

data.name: OpenCopilotPromptAndPaneReadyStatus
data.value: Prompt copied and GitHub Copilot Chat opened. Paste the prompt in Visual Studio and send it.

data.name: ChatReplyShownStatus
data.value: Microsoft 365 Copilot response shown in the panel.

data.name: WorkIqReplyShownStatus
data.value: Work IQ response shown in the panel.

data.name: AssistantResponseAppendedStatus
data.value: Copilot response inserted into the active editor.

data.name: AssistantResponseReplacedStatus
data.value: Active editor selection or document replaced with the Copilot response.

data.name: NoActiveEditorStatus
data.value: No active text editor is available.

data.name: AskPreviewOpenedStatus_Format
data.value: Opened the Microsoft 365 Copilot response in a new editor tab ({0}). Used {1} pinned snippet(s) as context and saved the reply to chat.

data.name: AskReplyShownStatus_Format
data.value: Microsoft 365 Copilot response shown in the panel. Used {0} pinned snippet(s) as context.

data.name: AskReplyShownWithContextBreakdownStatus_Format
data.value: Microsoft 365 Copilot response shown in the panel. Used {0} pinned snippet(s) and {1} local file context item(s).

data.name: ChatReplyShownWithContextStatus_Format
data.value: Microsoft 365 Copilot response shown in the panel. Used {0} explicit ContextRelay context item(s).

data.name: FilePickerFilesAddedStatus_Format
data.value: Added {0} file mention(s) to the query.

data.name: FilePickerFilesAddedPartialStatus_Format
data.value: Added {0} file mention(s); skipped {1} file(s) due to duplicates, workspace bounds, or mention limit.

data.name: FilePickerMentionLimitReachedStatus_Format
data.value: You can reference up to {0} files per message.

data.name: FileMentionOutsideWorkspaceStatus_Format
data.value: File #{0} is outside the opened workspace.

data.name: FileMentionAmbiguousStatus_Format
data.value: File path "#{0}" is ambiguous across workspace roots. Use a unique path.

data.name: FileMentionUnsupportedFileTypeStatus_Format
data.value: Unsupported file type for #{0}. Only Copilot-supported file extensions are allowed.

data.name: AddFilesDialogTitle
data.value: Select files to add as context

data.name: CreatedFilesFolderDialogTitle
data.value: Select a folder for ContextRelay-created files

data.name: HelpFor_mail
data.value: Example: /mail from:alice subject:budget Example: /mail incident review

data.name: HelpFor_teams
data.value: Example: /teams sprint review Example: /teams from:bob mentions:me

data.name: HelpFor_sharepoint
data.value: Example: /sharepoint VPN setup guide Example: /sharepoint architecture

data.name: HelpFor_onedrive
data.value: Example: /onedrive architecture diagram Example: /onedrive Q3 report

data.name: HelpFor_onenote
data.value: Example: /onenote architecture decision log Example: /onenote section notebook architecture

data.name: HelpFor_task
data.value: Example: /task release checklist Example: /task metadata comments onboarding

data.name: HelpFor_connectors
data.value: Example: /connectors incident tracker Example: /connectors external knowledge base

data.name: HelpFor_all
data.value: Example: /all architecture decisions Example: /mail /onedrive architecture decisions Plain text without a slash command starts or continues Microsoft 365 Copilot chat.

data.name: HelpFor_scopedSources_Format
data.value: Example: {0} architecture decisions Example: {1} incident review Searches only the explicitly requested sources.

data.name: HelpFor_ask
data.value: Example: /ask #README.md Summarize this file as a bullet list Example: /ask Translate the pinned docs to Japanese and format as markdown Pinned snippets or # file mentions are used as context and the response is shown in the panel.

data.name: HelpFor_workiq
data.value: Example: /workiq Summarize my recent emails from Alice Example: /workiq #docs/plan.md Find related workplace context Sends a natural language query to the Work IQ Gateway (A2A protocol). # file mentions send bounded local file text only when explicitly enabled.

data.name: HelpFor_clear
data.value: Example: /clear Clears the current chat transcript and discards all pinned snippets.

data.name: CommandDescription_task
data.value: Search Planner and To Do tasks.

data.name: CommandDescription_ask
data.value: Chat with Microsoft 365 Copilot using pinned or # file context.

data.name: CommandDescription_workiq
data.value: Query Work IQ for Microsoft 365 work intelligence, optionally with # file context.

data.name: CommandDescription_clear
data.value: Clear the current chat transcript and pinned snippets.
